desc: Navigates the UI to a clash identified by clashId: section box, active 3D view, selection, and zoom.
summary: Navigates the UI to a clash identified by clashId: section box, active 3D view, selection, and zoom. Delegates geometry framing to Create3DSectionBox.FromElements.

preprompts: Navigating to clash in the model…
thinkingsteps: Resolve clash row from latest QA XML…
Frame clash elements in a managed 3D view…
Activate view and zoom to selection…
